description:

**Uncensored,Dual Audio,English Subs**  
  
![Image](http://s3.directupload.net/images/110228/4j8mfhvg.png)  
**Lesson 1: Welcome to the all-girls dormitory!**  
  
**It felt like heaven when Takuro Hayami first transferred to St. Alcadia School with its all girls dormitory! The babes are luscious and Saori Otokawa, the caretaker, is the hottest of them all. Being extravagantly welcomed by the girls, his expectations for a heavenly school life were huge. But his bubble began to burst when the beautiful but malicious Morimoto sisters, who actually control the school, try and control Takuro when they discover his hidden "Ultimate Sex Power."**  
  
**Lesson 2: Girl's Battle Royal has Begun!**  
  
**Reona Morimoto, who controls the school, solicits Takuro to join her "Social Club." Her only intention is to have his "Ultimate sex Power" just for herself. He refuses with all his might, but rumor about his sexual power has spread in the school. Now, aside from the "Social Club," the Tennis, Swimming and other clubs started soliciting Takuro! Irritated, Reona kidnaps and imprisons Takuro's love interest, Saori, to lure Takuro into visiting her club.**

description:
[**Register at Fileserve**](http://fileserve.com/signup.php?reff=OWgqpgNTt50~)  
  
Translated version of 恋姫†無双～ドキッ☆乙女だらけの三国志演義～  
  
Language: English  
  
Game DDL Links:  
  
[**File name: saaaa.exe File size: 625.93 KB**](http://www.fileserve.com/file/ZXjgeuX)  
[**File name: D01.zip File size: 699.51 MB**](http://www.fileserve.com/file/cXDpByF)  
[**File name: D02.zip File size: 662.30 MB**](http://www.fileserve.com/file/k2vSjRM)  
  
Rename Saaa.exe to Koihime.exe  
  
Voice Patches:   
  
[**File name: kyaap01.rar.rar File size: 190.73 MB**](http://www.fileserve.com/file/vntNNrY)  
[**File name: kyaap02.rar.rar File size: 190.73 MB**](http://www.fileserve.com/file/HpdUey6)  
[**File name: kyaap03.rar.rar File size: 190.73 MB**](http://www.fileserve.com/file/KrWHcAu)  
[**File name: kyaap04.rar.rar File size: 190.73 MB**](http://www.fileserve.com/file/rMAGTqx)  
[**File name: kyaap05.rar.rar File size: 190.73 MB**](http://www.fileserve.com/file/MGQXMxJ)  
[**File name: kyaap06.rar.rar File size: 190.73 MB**](http://www.fileserve.com/file/vVwSu9y)  
[**File name: kyaap07.rar.rar File size: 190.73 MB**](http://www.fileserve.com/file/YpT6zTF)  
[**File name: kyaap08.rar.rar File size: 190.73 MB**](http://www.fileserve.com/file/XmMyH7S)  
[**File name: kyaap09.rar.rar File size: 180.22 MB**](http://www.fileserve.com/file/BKkgT66)  
[**File name: kyaap\_acl.rar File size: 2.44 MB**](http://www.fileserve.com/file/8rdK6yW)  
  
The acl file is the one containing the patches. Rest are sound data.  
  
\#  
How to use voice patch  
\#  
1. Download voice patch and extract it into your koihime folder  
\#  
2. Replace the SoundPackSEVo and SoundPackSEVo.lst in your koihime folder with the one from the Japanese game.  
\#  
3. Start the game and enjoy the voices.  
  
Additional info I forgot to post before:  
Files you should delete to make the voices work correctly:  
  
Spoiler:  
0SNSOUGI-006C.SNX  
SNRYOFU-003.SNX  
SNRYOFU-009  
0SNMAIN-005B1.SNX,  
0SNMAIN-004C.SNX  
SNCHOUN-007.SNX  
  
However, don't delete them. Just change the extension to SNX1 or something. Being fail safe is always a good thing ;)

![Image](http://s7.directupload.net/images/110301/e83zd32f.png)  
**St. Alcadia's Darkest Secret about to be revealed!**  
  
**What is this "Secret Party" that the Morimoto group is concocting up at the Reception Hall? A number of students whose families are in financial trouble have been blackmailed to become sex slaves to pay off their debts to the school. Madoka asks Takuro, Saori and her other dorm mates for help in stealing the incriminating "Student Registry" to end the blackmailing, but...**  
  
**The Carnal Battle ends with a surprising finale!**  
  
**Saori, Ruri and Yuuki's sexual maneuvering finally got them to access the safe box where the infamous "Student Registry" was hidden. While the "Secret Party" was in full swing, the computerized security system malfunctions and discovers the trio's intrusion! Mad as hell, Leina closes down all the security breaches and traps the intruders. She orders their capture using teams of armored combat vehicles, maids, helicopters and macho hunks! To rescue her captured friends from being sexually disciplined, Saori seeks out Leina alone...**

title: loli.pant.su batch torrent March-May 2010
description:
(Un)official batch torrent from loli.pant.su.  
  
Contains everything from where the 137GiB lolisv4 left off:  
From start of March 2010 to the end of May 2010.  
  
Has all files from that time frame, possible duplicates and all. Not organized, and files are named as found on the site. Also contains all the .dlc-files for the releases if someone wishes to download using them (be warned, a great portion may-or-may-not be offline).  
  
Will seed whenever I can and might be down a for a moment, but will get back to it. If this has enough interest, I'll be making another torrent from the next 3 months. WILL be slow, at least when starting (o rly).  
  
Original downloads provided by Len at loli.pant.su, so go thank him for keeping the site up. And enjoy the loli and whatnot.  
  
EDIT: And keep seeding for long as you can so everyone will get it.  
EDIT [\#2](http://sukebei.nyaa.se/?page=view&tid=2): Though this torrent contains everything from the above time period, lolisv4 ended up in "early february", so it's missing a few weeks of doujins from the site until the start of March. I might make a torrent containing the missing ones when I feel like it.
